complaint_text: i have been charged twice amount for the product
suggested_reply:
Dear Valued Customer,

Thank you for your feedback. We appreciate you taking the time to contact us. Our billing team will review your account and ensure any incorrect charges are reversed promptly.

We appreciate your patience and will be in touch shortly.

Warm regards,
Customer Support Team

complaint_text: The item I received is damaged/defective and does not work as described.
suggested_reply:
Dear Valued Customer,

Thank you for your feedback. We appreciate you taking the time to contact us. A replacement will be arranged and we've notified our quality assurance team about this issue.

We appreciate your patience and will be in touch shortly.

Warm regards,
Customer Support Team
